final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the LFSR will be reset to an all-zero state, but in reality, it sets the LFSR to 6'b000001.
module fibonacci_lfsr
(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [5:0] lfsr
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            lfsr <= 6'b000001; // Set LFSR to initial value
        end else begin
            lfsr <= {lfsr[4:0], lfsr[5] ^ lfsr[4]}; // Shift and XOR taps
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the LFSR will be reset to an all-zero state, but in reality, it sets the LFSR to 6'b000001.
